method_summary: A trust-aware post-routing framework that reweights clients using returned-evidence feedback, including retrieval relevance, profile consistency, and cross-client agreement
key_innovation: The trust-aware post-routing framework that reweights clients based on returned-evidence feedback to suppress persistent hijacking over recurring queries
limitations_stated: Existing defenses do not close this gap
Byzantine-robust Federated Learning (FL) rules transfer poorly to heterogeneous routing profiles
title: A Wolf in Sheep's Clothing: Targeted Routing Hijacking in Federated RAG
